page_content:
Recommended: EDHI605.

Credit Only Granted for. EDHI707, EDHI713 or EDHI788N.

Formerly: EDHI788N.

EDHI725 Education in East Asia (3 Credits)

The course traces the cultural and intellectual history of education in East Asia, and examine features and important issues in East Asian education systems. School reform and social changes are studied. Credit Only Granted for. EDHI725, EDPL725, or EDPS725.
